News|World

The opening ceremony of the Olympic Games invites athletes and viewers from across the globe to discover the culture of the host country through music, song and dance.

At the 2024 Paris gamesLady Gaga has been spotted rehersing aheadof the ceremony on Friday evening.

Across the years a number of high-profile music artists have played at the games including English rock bandArctic Monkeysand Icelandic singer Bjork.

Here we take a look at some of the musical acts who have played at the opening ceremonies of the summer games through the years:

In 2004 the Olympics took place in Athens, Greece, the city where the first international summer games took place in 1896.

Icelandic singer Bjork performed her song Oceania wearing a blue dress with draping fabric that billowed around her.

The ceremony also saw DJ and producer Tiesto, who has collaborated with the likes ofCharli XCXand Karol G, bring electronic music to the global stage.

The Beijing Olympics famously included 2008 drummers playing bronze fou drums.

They all drummed to the same beat while quoting from The Analects Of Confucius: “Isn’t it delightful to have friends coming from afar?”.

English soprano singer Sarah Brightman was also involved and sang the Beijing Olympics’ theme song, You And Me.

A number of high-profile British artists played at the opening ceremony of the London Olympics and there was also an appearance from actor Rowan Atkinson.

Performing as his comical alter-ego Mr Bean, Atkinson helped theLondon Symphony Orchestrawith their performance of Chariots Of Fire.

The ceremony, which took viewers through the history of the UK, included performances from pop singerEmeli Sande, with her hit song Read All About It, (Pt III), and rapperDizzee Rascal, with his chart-topping single Bonkers.

New documentary explores what Sir Paul McCartney did after The Beatles broke up

Charli XCX film The Moment gets UK and Ireland release date

Paul Mescal addresses claims he’s stepping back from acting until 2028

Discover a hidden island paradise in the Indian Ocean

Elsewhere Arctic Monkeys performed I Bet You Look Good On The Dancefloor alongside a rendition of Come Together byThe Beatles.

Brazilian singerAnittawas among the music artists who performed at the Rio Olympics in 2016.

The 31-year-old performed alongside the politician and singer Gilberto Gil and singer Caetano Veloso.

At the Tokyo Olympics the number of athletes who took part in the opening ceremony was vastly reduced due to the Covid-19 pandemic, which had led to the games being postponed in 2020.

The lighting of the torch took place in front of empty stands but there were still some performances as well as a video of US songwriterJohn Legendleading a lengthy rendition of John Lennon’s Imagine.

title: Olympic opening ceremony acts through the years from Arctic Monkeys to Bjork | The Standard
author: Hannah Roberts
description: Arctic Monkeys performed a rendition of Come Together by The Beatles at the 2012 London Olympics
keywords: Arctic Monkeys, The Beatles, Dizzee Rascal, Emeli Sande, Anitta, John Legend, Charli XCX, London Symphony Orchestra
